public boolean canIWin(int maxChoosableInteger, int desiredTotal) {

    int sum = maxChoosableInteger * (maxChoosableInteger + 1) / 2;
    if (sum < desiredTotal) return false;
    Map<Integer, Boolean> memo = new HashMap<>();
    return canWin(maxChoosableInteger, desiredTotal, 0, memo);
}

private boolean canWin(int m, int d, int mask, Map<Integer, Boolean> memo) {
    if (memo.containsKey(mask)) return memo.get(mask);

    // compute currentSum
    int currentSum = 0;
    for (int i=1; i<=m; i++) {
        if ((mask & (1 << (i-1))) != 0) {
            currentSum += i;
        }
    }

    // check if any move leads to immediate win
    for (int i=1; i<=m; i++) {
        if ( (mask & (1 << (i-1))) == 0 ) { // not chosen yet
            if (currentSum + i >= d) {
                memo.put(mask | (1 << (i-1)), true);
                return true;
            }
        }
    }

    // check for all possible next moves
    for (int i=1; i<=m; i++) {
        if ( (mask & (1 << (i-1))) == 0 ) {
            int newMask = mask | (1 << (i-1));
            if (!canWin(m, d, newMask, memo)) {
                memo.put(mask, true);
                return true;
            }
        }
    }

    memo.put(mask, false);
    return false;
}

So the code would look like:

class Solution {
    public boolean canIWin(int maxChoosableInteger, int desiredTotal) {
        int total = maxChoosableInteger * (maxChoosableInteger + 1) / 2;
        if (total < desiredTotal) {
            return false;
        }
        Map<Integer, Boolean> memo = new HashMap<>();
        return canWin(maxChoosableInteger, desiredTotal, 0, memo);
    }
    
    private boolean canWin(int m, int d, int mask, Map<Integer, Boolean> memo) {
        if (memo.containsKey(mask)) {
            return memo.get(mask);
        }
        
        // Compute currentSum
        int currentSum = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
            if ((mask & (1 << (i - 1))) != 0) {
                currentSum += i;
            }
        }
        
        // Check if any move leads to immediate win
        for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
            if ((mask & (1 << (i - 1))) == 0) {  // i is available
                if (currentSum + i >= d) {
                    memo.put(mask | (1 << (i - 1)), true);
                    return true;
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Try all possible moves
        for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
            if ((mask & (1 << (i - 1))) == 0) {
                // Take this number
                int newMask = mask | (1 << (i - 1));
                if (!canWin(m, d, newMask, memo)) {
                    memo.put(mask, true);
                    return true;
                }
            }
        }
        
        memo.put(mask, false);
        return false;
    }
}
